message: Hint: Use WASD to move your charcter. Move your mouse to control the camera
Hint: Spikes are dangerous and will kill you instantly, try jumping over them
Hint: Purple Gems will determine the players score. Blue gems are ULTIMATE gems, these count 10 points
Hint: When you loose a life you will respawn by small checkpoints, when you lose all your lives you will respawn at the last big checkpoint
